creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed with the following changes, thanks! 

- For the distfile search: 
http://openlab.ring.gr.jp/efont/dist/shinonome/old/ 
as well as: 
http://openlab.ring.gr.jp/efont/dist/shinonome/ 

- Get `make reinstall' to work by moving the gzip compression part 
from do-install to post-build 

- Add some %%PORTDOCS%%'s to pkg-plist 

FYI, a new version 0.9.3 seemed to have been released and I found the 
0.9.2 distfile under the subdirectory `old/'.  I changed the port to 
search there as well, but you may want to update the port to 0.9.3 
right away. :)
